name: Rank Ranger
skip_reason: Rank Ranger was acquired by Similarweb in 2022. Its official domain (rankranger.com) now funnels core product pages (e.g. /rank-tracker) via 301 redirects to similarweb.com marketing pages, and the remaining homepage content is polluted with unrelated affiliate spam. There is no independent, current product/pricing page left to verify facts against.

enrichment.short_description: Advanced Web Ranking is SEO rank tracking software that monitors keyword rankings across Google, Bing, YouTube, and Amazon with automated reporting.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Advanced Web Ranking tracks SEO rankings across search engines with unlimited projects, SEO forecasting, and white-label reporting.

features.title: Multi-engine rank tracking
features.description: Tracks daily, weekly, or on-demand rankings across Google, Bing, YouTube, Amazon, and country-specific engines like Baidu and Naver.

features.title: SERP feature & CTR analysis
features.description: Analyzes SERP features and click-through rate impact down to pixel-level detail.

features.title: SEO forecasting
features.description: Projects ranking and traffic outcomes to estimate ROI on SEO work.

features.title: Competitor tracking
features.description: Monitors rankings for up to 50 competitors per project.

features.title: White-label reporting
features.description: Generates automated, brandable reports for agencies and clients.

features.title: Reporting integrations
features.description: Connects to Google Looker Studio, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Bing Webmaster Tools.

pros: Unlimited projects, users, and reports on every plan
Tracks rankings beyond Google, including YouTube, Amazon, Baidu, and Naver
Includes SEO forecasting and ROI projection tools
30-day money-back guarantee on paid plans
cons: No permanent free plan, only a 7-day free trial
Entry-level Pro plan is capped at 7,000 keywords
Developer API access and BigQuery Connector are limited to higher-tier plans

faqs.question: Does Advanced Web Ranking offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 7-day free trial is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Which search engines can it track?
faqs.answer: Google, Bing, YouTube, Amazon, and country-specific engines such as Baidu and Naver.

faqs.question: Does it include an API?
faqs.answer: Yes, developer API access is available starting on the Agency plan.

faqs.question: How many competitors can I track?
faqs.answer: Up to 50 competitors per project.

use_cases.title: Agency client reporting
use_cases.description: White-label automated reports for managing multiple client accounts.

use_cases.title: Enterprise rank monitoring
use_cases.description: Cross-project reporting and BigQuery integration for large keyword sets.

use_cases.title: Freelance SEO tracking
use_cases.description: Unlimited projects on a single paid seat for independent consultants.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Advanced Web Ranking?
paragraphs: Advanced Web Ranking (AWR) is a rank tracking platform that monitors keyword positions across multiple search engines, including Google, Bing, YouTube, and Amazon. It layers on SERP feature analysis, SEO forecasting, and automated reporting.
All plans include unlimited projects, users, and reports, with higher tiers unlocking more tracked keywords, API access, and custom data integrations like BigQuery.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Advanced Web Ranking is for
paragraphs: It's built for SEO agencies and enterprise teams that need to track large keyword sets across several search engines and deliver white-label reports to clients or stakeholders.

enrichment.short_description: Sitebulb is a technical SEO crawler and audit tool available as a desktop app and cloud platform, flagging 300+ issues per crawl.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Sitebulb is a website crawler for technical SEO audits, offering 300+ automated issue checks via a desktop app or cloud platform.

features.title: Large-scale crawling
features.description: Crawls up to 500,000 URLs per audit on Desktop Pro, or up to 10 million URLs on Cloud.

features.title: 300+ automated issue checks
features.description: Flags technical SEO issues with prioritized 'Hints' explaining why each one matters.

features.title: JavaScript rendering
features.description: Crawls and renders JavaScript-powered pages at no extra cost.

features.title: Cloud team collaboration
features.description: Sitebulb Cloud supports real-time collaboration across team members.

features.title: Custom PDF reporting
features.description: Generates customized PDF audit reports with data visualizations.

features.title: Scheduled recurring crawls
features.description: Automates recurring audits on Cloud and Desktop Pro plans.

features.title: Reporting integrations
features.description: Connects with Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Google Sheets, and Data Studio.

pros: JavaScript rendering is included without an added fee, unlike some competitors
Prioritized 'Hints' explain the impact of each detected issue rather than just listing them
Offers both a one-time desktop license and a scalable cloud plan
14-day fully-featured free trial with no credit card required
cons: No permanent free plan
Desktop Lite plan is capped at 10,000 URLs per audit
Exact Cloud and Desktop pricing isn't published; current rates require checking the pricing page or sales

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sitebulb offers a fully-featured 14-day trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What's the difference between Desktop and Cloud?
faqs.answer: Desktop is a locally-installed app (Lite up to 10,000 URLs, Pro up to 500,000 URLs); Cloud removes project limits and runs automated recurring crawls.

faqs.question: Does Sitebulb render JavaScript?
faqs.answer: Yes, JavaScript crawling is included at no extra cost on all plans.

faqs.question: What integrations does Sitebulb support?
faqs.answer: Google Search Console, Google Analytics, Google Sheets, and Data Studio.

use_cases.title: Agency technical audits
use_cases.description: Branded PDF reports for client SEO audits.

use_cases.title: Enterprise site crawling
use_cases.description: Crawling from 500,000 up to 10 million URLs to catch technical issues at scale.

use_cases.title: Freelance SEO diagnostics
use_cases.description: A single-user desktop license for one-off technical audits.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Sitebulb?
paragraphs: Sitebulb is a website crawler built for technical SEO audits, available as a downloadable desktop app or a cloud-based platform. It runs 300+ automated checks per crawl and explains each issue with prioritized 'Hints'.
Desktop plans crawl up to 500,000 URLs per audit, while Cloud removes project limits and can handle up to 10 million URLs with automated recurring crawls.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Sitebulb is for
paragraphs: It suits digital agencies producing client-ready PDF audits, freelance SEOs who want a one-time desktop license, and larger teams that need Cloud-based recurring crawls at enterprise scale.

name: ContentKing
skip_reason: ContentKing was acquired by Conductor in 2022 and has been fully absorbed into Conductor's platform. Its official domain (contentkingapp.com) now 301-redirects entirely to conductor.com, where the product is marketed as 'Conductor Monitoring' under the Conductor brand. ContentKing no longer exists as a standalone, independently verifiable product.

enrichment.short_description: Oncrawl is a cloud-based technical SEO platform combining website crawling and log file analysis to diagnose search visibility issues.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Oncrawl combines web crawling and log file analysis for technical SEO, processing 300M+ URLs and 500M+ log lines with unsampled data.

features.title: JavaScript-rendering web crawler
features.description: Crawls sites at scale, having processed 300M+ URLs with JavaScript rendering.

features.title: Log file analyzer
features.description: Processes 500M+ log lines daily to track search engine bot behavior.

features.title: Monitoring & alerts
features.description: Automated detection of technical SEO regressions with alerting.

features.title: Pre-built analysis Lenses
features.description: Includes an AI Search Lens and Content Lens for guided technical insights.

features.title: Full REST API
features.description: Enables custom workflows and third-party tool integrations.

features.title: Unsampled data processing
features.description: Processes 100% of crawl and log data rather than statistical samples.

pros: Combines crawl data with server log analysis in one platform
Processes unsampled data rather than statistical sampling
Provides a full REST API for custom integrations
Includes a dedicated AI Search Lens for AI-driven search visibility analysis
cons: No public pricing; requires booking a demo to get a quote
No free trial or free plan advertised on the site
Geared toward large, complex sites rather than small websites

faqs.question: Does Oncrawl offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: No free trial or free plan is advertised; the site promotes demo-based onboarding instead.

faqs.question: Does Oncrawl analyze server logs?
faqs.answer: Yes, its Log Analyzer processes 500M+ log lines daily to track bot behavior.

faqs.question: Is there an API?
faqs.answer: Yes, Oncrawl provides a full REST API.

faqs.question: What languages does the site support?
faqs.answer: English and French.

use_cases.title: Enterprise technical SEO diagnostics
use_cases.description: Combining crawl and log data to fix regressions at scale.

use_cases.title: Crawl budget optimization
use_cases.description: Monitoring search engine bot behavior via log analysis.

use_cases.title: Large content inventory audits
use_cases.description: Using the Content Lens to review content performance across large sites.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Oncrawl?
paragraphs: Oncrawl is a cloud-based technical SEO platform that pairs a JavaScript-rendering web crawler with a log file analyzer, giving teams a combined view of crawlability and how search engine bots actually behave on their site.
The platform emphasizes unsampled data processing and offers a full REST API plus pre-built analysis 'Lenses,' including one focused on AI search.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Oncrawl is for
paragraphs: It's aimed at enterprise SEO teams, agencies, and large e-commerce or media sites that need to diagnose technical issues across complex, high-volume websites using both crawl and server log data.

enrichment.short_description: Botify is an enterprise AI search optimization platform helping large sites improve visibility across search engines and AI agents.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Botify helps enterprise and retail brands optimize visibility across search engines and AI agents through AI-readiness and analytics tools.

features.title: AgentiCatalog
features.description: Enriches product feeds so AI agents can better understand and recommend products.

features.title: SpeedWorkers
features.description: Delivers content to AI agents and bots in under 300ms.

features.title: AI Visibility analytics
features.description: Covers GEO performance, keywords, and AI agent/bot traffic analytics.

features.title: AI content & automation tools
features.description: Supports AI-generated content workflows and automated deployment.

features.title: Cross-platform indexation
features.description: Manages indexation and internal linking across large sites.

pros: Purpose-built for AI agent/chatbot visibility (GEO), not just traditional search
Used by large retail brands including Farfetch, Etsy, and Macy's
Recognized as a 'Strong Performer' in the Forrester Wave for SEO solutions (Q3 2025)
Combines technical readiness, analytics, and content activation in one platform
cons: No public pricing; access requires a demo request
No free trial or free plan advertised
Positioned for enterprise/large-scale sites, likely not cost-effective for small businesses

faqs.question: Can I try Botify for free?
faqs.answer: The site does not advertise a free trial; access requires requesting a demo.

faqs.question: Who uses Botify?
faqs.answer: Enterprise and growth companies, particularly in retail and e-commerce, including Farfetch, Etsy, and Macy's.

faqs.question: Does Botify help with AI search visibility?
faqs.answer: Yes, its AI Visibility and AI Readiness tools are built for optimizing presence in AI agents and chatbots, not just traditional search engines.

faqs.question: Is Botify a search engine partner?
faqs.answer: Yes, it's listed as a Google and Microsoft Bing partner.

use_cases.title: Retail AI visibility
use_cases.description: Enriching product feeds so AI shopping agents can recommend products.

use_cases.title: Enterprise technical SEO at scale
use_cases.description: Monitoring and fixing indexation and crawl issues across large sites.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Botify?
paragraphs: Botify is an AI search optimization platform aimed at helping enterprises become visible to both traditional search engines and AI agents/chatbots. It's organized around three pillars: AI Readiness, AI Visibility, and AI Activation.
Notable customers include Farfetch, Etsy, Macy's, Ralph Lauren, L'Occitane, and Crocs, and the platform holds Google and Microsoft Bing partner status.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Botify is for
paragraphs: It's built for enterprise and growth-stage companies, particularly in retail and e-commerce, that need to manage AI and search visibility across large product catalogs and complex sites.

enrichment.short_description: Lumar (formerly DeepCrawl) is an enterprise platform for technical SEO, AI search visibility, site speed, and accessibility audits.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Lumar, formerly DeepCrawl, is an enterprise platform for technical SEO, AI visibility (GEO/AEO), site speed, and web accessibility audits.

features.title: Four core apps
features.description: Analyze, Monitor, Protect, and Impact cover crawling, monitoring, protection, and business impact analysis.

features.title: 250+ built-in reports
features.description: Provides extensive built-in reporting plus custom data extraction.

features.title: AI/GEO-AEO visibility metrics
features.description: Tracks visibility in AI search platforms alongside traditional SEO.

features.title: Site speed analysis
features.description: Includes Core Web Vitals and site-speed diagnostics.

features.title: Accessibility testing
features.description: Tests web accessibility aligned to WCAG 2.2, Levels A through AAA.

features.title: Custom website analytics
features.description: Offers configurable analytics beyond standard SEO metrics.

features.title: API access
features.description: Provides an API for custom development and integrations.

features.title: Professional services
features.description: Includes dedicated SEO/AI search strategy support and crawl reviews.

pros: Combines technical SEO, AI visibility, site speed, and accessibility in one platform
SOC 2 Type 2 certified for data security and privacy
Used by large organizations including Adobe, Deloitte, Comcast, and Fandom
Includes dedicated professional services support
cons: No public pricing; requires a custom quote
No free trial or free plan advertised
Targeted at enterprise teams, likely cost-prohibitive for small sites

faqs.question: Was Lumar previously known as something else?
faqs.answer: Yes, the platform was formerly DeepCrawl and rebranded to Lumar.

faqs.question: Does Lumar offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: No free trial or free plan is advertised; pricing requires a quote request.

faqs.question: Does Lumar cover AI search visibility?
faqs.answer: Yes, it includes AI-powered GEO/AEO metrics for visibility in AI search platforms.

faqs.question: Is Lumar SOC 2 certified?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is SOC 2 Type 2 certified.

use_cases.title: Enterprise technical SEO & AI visibility
use_cases.description: Unifying crawl, speed, and GEO/AEO data for large sites.

use_cases.title: Accessibility compliance audits
use_cases.description: Running WCAG 2.2 testing alongside SEO checks.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Lumar?
paragraphs: Lumar, formerly known as DeepCrawl, is an enterprise website optimization platform built around four apps — Analyze, Monitor, Protect, and Impact — that cover technical SEO, AI search visibility (GEO/AEO), site speed, and web accessibility.
It's SOC 2 Type 2 certified and includes 250+ built-in reports, an API for custom development, and access to a professional services team.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Lumar is for
paragraphs: Lumar targets enterprise organizations and agencies — customers cited on the site include Adobe, Deloitte, Comcast, and Fandom — that need to manage technical SEO, AI visibility, speed, and accessibility across large, complex websites.

enrichment.short_description: Seobility is an all-in-one SEO suite for website audits, rank tracking, backlink analysis, and competitor research.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Seobility offers SEO site audits, rank tracking, and backlink monitoring, with a free Basic plan and a 14-day trial on paid plans.

features.title: Website audit crawler
features.description: Detects technical issues such as broken links, duplicate content, and slow-loading pages.

features.title: Rank tracking
features.description: Monitors keyword rankings and visibility changes over time.

features.title: Backlink analysis
features.description: Tracks link profiles and surfaces new link-building opportunities.

features.title: Competitor analysis
features.description: Compares rankings, backlinks, and estimated traffic against competitors.

features.title: Uptime monitoring
features.description: Alerts users when their website goes down.

features.title: White-label reporting
features.description: Generates branded PDF reports for agency clients.

features.title: Free standalone tools
features.description: Offers 9 free tools usable without registration, including an SEO Checker and Backlink Checker.

pros: Free Basic plan available with no payment required
14-day free trial on paid Premium and Agency tiers
Combines audit, rank tracking, and backlink analysis in one subscription
Offers free standalone tools usable without creating an account
cons: Free Basic plan is limited to 1 project, 1,000 pages per crawl, and 10 tracked keywords
Additional projects and keywords beyond plan limits cost extra per month
Phone support is only available on the top Agency tier

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Basic plan is free, with 1 project, 1,000 pages per crawl, and 10 tracked keywords.

faqs.question: How much does Seobility Premium cost?
faqs.answer: €49.90/month, or €479/year billed annually (a 20% saving).

faqs.question: Where is Seobility based?
faqs.answer: Nuremberg, Germany.

faqs.question: What languages does Seobility support?
faqs.answer: English, German, and Spanish.

use_cases.title: Small business SEO audits
use_cases.description: Identifying technical issues on a free or low-cost plan.

use_cases.title: Agency client reporting
use_cases.description: White-label PDF reports across multiple client projects.

use_cases.title: Ongoing rank & backlink monitoring
use_cases.description: Tracking keyword and backlink changes over time.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Seobility?
paragraphs: Seobility is an SEO software suite that combines website auditing, rank tracking, backlink analysis, and competitor research in a single subscription. A free Basic plan covers one project with limited crawl and keyword allowances.
Paid Premium and Agency plans add more projects, larger crawl limits, backlink and uptime monitoring, and white-label PDF reporting, backed by a 14-day free trial.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Seobility is for
paragraphs: It suits small businesses, freelancers, and agencies that want an affordable, all-in-one SEO toolkit, with a free tier for basic needs and paid plans that scale up to agency-level client reporting.

enrichment.short_description: WooRank is an all-in-one digital marketing platform for website reviews, SEO audits, rank tracking, and competitive analysis.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: WooRank provides instant website reviews, SEO audits, keyword rank tracking, and white-label reporting for agencies and marketing teams.

features.title: Instant website review
features.description: Generates an instant SEO score and review for any website.

features.title: Keyword rank tracking
features.description: Tracks keyword rankings alongside keyword research.

features.title: Technical SEO site crawl
features.description: Audits sites for technical SEO issues.

features.title: Competitive analysis
features.description: Compares a site's SEO performance against competitors.

features.title: White-label reporting
features.description: Provides branded reporting for agencies.

features.title: Lead generation tools
features.description: Uses site audit data to support sales prospecting.

features.title: Google Analytics 4 integration
features.description: Connects with GA4 for combined analytics reporting.

features.title: API access
features.description: Offers API access for enterprise clients.

pros: Free SEO trial produces an instant website report without a long-term commitment
Supports six languages: English, German, Spanish, French, Dutch, and Portuguese
Combines SEO auditing, competitive analysis, and lead-gen tools in one platform
Claims a large analyzed-site base (50 million+ websites, per site statistics)
cons: Exact pricing tiers are not published on the site; you must select a plan to see cost
API access is limited to enterprise clients
No dedicated mobile app mentioned on the site

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, WooRank offers a 'Free SEO Trial' that generates a website report.

faqs.question: What languages does WooRank support?
faqs.answer: English, German, Spanish, French, Dutch, and Portuguese.

faqs.question: Who owns WooRank?
faqs.answer: WooRank is owned by Bridgeline.

faqs.question: Does WooRank offer an API?
faqs.answer: Yes, API access is available for enterprise clients.

use_cases.title: Instant site audits
use_cases.description: Quick website scoring for prospecting or self-review.

use_cases.title: Agency white-label reporting
use_cases.description: Branded SEO reports for client accounts.

use_cases.title: Sales lead generation
use_cases.description: Using site audit data as a sales conversation starter.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is WooRank?
paragraphs: WooRank is a digital marketing platform that produces instant website reviews and SEO scores, alongside keyword rank tracking, technical site crawls, and competitive analysis. It's owned by Bridgeline.
The platform also includes lead generation features aimed at sales teams and white-label reporting for agencies, with GA4 integration and enterprise API access.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who WooRank is for
paragraphs: It's positioned for marketing teams, sales teams, SEO agencies, and small businesses that want quick, shareable website audits alongside ongoing rank tracking and competitive analysis.

enrichment.short_description: Rank Math is a WordPress SEO plugin offering on-page analysis, schema markup, rank tracking, and sitemaps, free with paid Pro tiers.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Rank Math is a WordPress SEO plugin with on-page analysis, a schema generator, and rank tracking, free to download with paid Pro upgrades.

features.title: On-page SEO analysis
features.description: Analyzes content across 30 on-page ranking factors.

features.title: Schema markup generator
features.description: Generates 20+ schema types, including FAQ and HowTo markup.

features.title: Built-in rank tracking
features.description: Tracks keyword rankings directly inside WordPress.

features.title: Google Search Console integration
features.description: Pulls Search Console data into the WordPress dashboard.

features.title: One-click plugin import
features.description: Imports settings from other WordPress SEO plugins in one click.

features.title: Automated XML sitemaps
features.description: Generates and manages XML sitemaps automatically.

features.title: Broken link checker
features.description: Detects broken links and supports automated keyword linking.

features.title: Editor compatibility
features.description: Works with both the Gutenberg block editor and Classic Editor.

pros: Free version available for download alongside paid Pro tiers
4 million+ active installs and a 4.8/5 rating from 7,461+ WordPress.org reviews
Supports 20+ schema types out of the box
Available in 8 languages
cons: Higher keyword-tracking limits and more client sites require paid Business/Agency tiers
WordPress-only; not usable outside the WordPress ecosystem
Renewal pricing is higher than the discounted first-year annual rate

faqs.question: Is Rank Math free?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free version is available for download; paid PRO, Business, and Agency tiers add more keyword tracking and site limits.

faqs.question: How much does Rank Math PRO cost?
faqs.answer: €7.99/month billed annually, renewing at €8.99/month plus taxes.

faqs.question: How many keywords can I track?
faqs.answer: 500 on PRO, 10,000 on Business, and 50,000 on Agency.

faqs.question: What languages does Rank Math support?
faqs.answer: English, German, Dutch, French, Japanese, Spanish, Italian, and Finnish.

use_cases.title: Solo blogger on-page SEO
use_cases.description: Using the free plugin for schema, sitemaps, and keyword optimization.

use_cases.title: Agency client site management
use_cases.description: Managing SEO for up to 500 client sites on the Agency plan.

use_cases.title: In-house keyword tracking
use_cases.description: Tracking up to 50,000 keywords across managed sites.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Rank Math?
paragraphs: Rank Math is a WordPress SEO plugin that handles on-page analysis, schema markup, XML sitemaps, and keyword rank tracking directly inside the WordPress dashboard. A free version is available for download, with PRO, Business, and Agency tiers unlocking higher keyword and site limits.
It has more than 4 million active installs and a 4.8/5 rating from over 7,461 reviews on WordPress.org.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Rank Math is for
paragraphs: It's built for WordPress site owners — from solo bloggers using the free version to agencies managing SEO for hundreds of client sites on the Agency plan.
